CurrentIssues.ID: MaxLineLength:ChimeraGameDatabase.kt$ChimeraGameDatabase.Companion.<no name provided>$db.execSQL("CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS index_character_equipment_character_id_equip_slot ON character_equipment(character_id, equip_slot)")
MaxLineLength:InventoryDao.kt$InventoryDao$@Query("UPDATE inventory_items SET quantity = quantity - :amount WHERE save_slot_id = :slotId AND item_id = :itemId AND quantity >= :amount")
